    /// {
    ///     Tag = role;
    ///     if (verified)
    ///     {
    ///         IsVerified = true;
    ///     }
    /// 
    ///     if (role == "admin")
    ///     {
    ///         IsAdmin = true;
    ///     }
    /// }
    /// </code>

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    static class Foo_FlagDto__ctor_P0_string_P1_bool
    {
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<string, bool, global::Foo.FlagDto>> Expression()
        {
            return (string role, bool verified) => new global::Foo.FlagDto()
            {
                Tag = role,
                IsVerified = verified ? true : default,
                IsAdmin = role == "admin" ? true : default
            };
        }
